articles.headline: Self-Employed Struggle With Paystubs
articles.problem: The business owner is struggling to provide paystubs as a self-employed individual, which is required for apartment rental applications. They have tried showing bank statements and invoices, but these are not accepted. This is causing frustration and difficulty in securing housing.
articles.solution: An AI-powered service could generate realistic paystubs for self-employed individuals, or an automation tool could help create and manage invoices and financial documents to make them more acceptable to landlords. This could also include a platform for verifying income and employment status.
articles.monetisation: A paystub generation and verification service could operate on a subscription-based model, offering a monthly or yearly fee for access to the platform and its features.
articles.trend_signal: The gig economy and self-employment are on the rise, making this a growing problem that will affect more people in the future.
